intro: Barosma betulina, also known as the "Round Bush" or "Buchu", is a plant native to South Africa that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The tea made from its leaves is said to have various health benefits, including aiding digestion and relieving urinary tract issues due to its antimicrobial properties. Barosma betulina tea is also believed to have antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being.
